scripts.stack:seed: docker compose run --rm api python -m app.seeds.seed_demo
scripts.stack:seed:lab: docker compose run --rm api python -m app.seeds.load_sample_dataset
scripts.stack:test: docker compose run --rm api pytest tests && docker compose run --rm web npm run test && docker compose run --rm web npm run build
scripts.test: npm run api:test && npm run web:test && npm run web:build
